## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Flow improvements and explore Marcel's vision for more intuitive, context-aware workflow creation and refinement.](https://fathom.video/share/7MFc_mQcsKXhEatURdCVcKopFx8j1dsi?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Current Flow experience lacks flexibility and deep understanding of knowledge work processes](https://fathom.video/share/7MFc_mQcsKXhEatURdCVcKopFx8j1dsi?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Need for more granular, customizable building blocks in workflow creation](https://fathom.video/share/7MFc_mQcsKXhEatURdCVcKopFx8j1dsi?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Importance of human interventions, signal collection, and evaluation mechanisms in the system](https://fathom.video/share/7MFc_mQcsKXhEatURdCVcKopFx8j1dsi?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Desire for a chat-like experience that allows for iterative refinement of workflows](https://fathom.video/share/7MFc_mQcsKXhEatURdCVcKopFx8j1dsi?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)

## Topics

### Current Flow Limitations

  - [Flow's current structure is too rigid and doesn't allow for easy iteration or customization](https://fathom.video/share/7MFc_mQcsKXhEatURdCVcKopFx8j1dsi?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Lack of semantic understanding and context awareness in the current system](https://fathom.video/share/7MFc_mQcsKXhEatURdCVcKopFx8j1dsi?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Inability to make changes or refine workflows once created](https://fathom.video/share/7MFc_mQcsKXhEatURdCVcKopFx8j1dsi?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [Missing the nuanced understanding of knowledge work that humans bring to the process](https://fathom.video/share/7MFc_mQcsKXhEatURdCVcKopFx8j1dsi?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)

### Vision for Improved Workflow Creation

  - [Desire for a more intuitive, chat-like experience for creating and refining workflows](https://fathom.video/share/7MFc_mQcsKXhEatURdCVcKopFx8j1dsi?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Need for smaller, more customizable building blocks (e.g., question generation, research steps)](https://fathom.video/share/7MFc_mQcsKXhEatURdCVcKopFx8j1dsi?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Ability to seamlessly move between high-level planning and granular prompt-level adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/7MFc_mQcsKXhEatURdCVcKopFx8j1dsi?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Incorporation of context and artifacts to inform workflow creation and refinement](https://fathom.video/share/7MFc_mQcsKXhEatURdCVcKopFx8j1dsi?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)

### Human Intervention and Evaluation

  - [Importance of defining types of human interventions (e.g., approval, comments, open-ended input)](https://fathom.video/share/7MFc_mQcsKXhEatURdCVcKopFx8j1dsi?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Need for mechanisms to evaluate the quality and effectiveness of human inputs](https://fathom.video/share/7MFc_mQcsKXhEatURdCVcKopFx8j1dsi?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [Desire for a system that knows when to ask for clarification or human input](https://fathom.video/share/7MFc_mQcsKXhEatURdCVcKopFx8j1dsi?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [Collecting signals to improve confidence levels and decision-making in the workflow](https://fathom.video/share/7MFc_mQcsKXhEatURdCVcKopFx8j1dsi?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)

### Context Engineering and Artifact Creation

  - [Emphasis on creating and refining artifacts as a key part of the workflow process](https://fathom.video/share/7MFc_mQcsKXhEatURdCVcKopFx8j1dsi?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [Importance of context in generating high-quality outputs (e.g., company research, founder profiles)](https://fathom.video/share/7MFc_mQcsKXhEatURdCVcKopFx8j1dsi?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [Need for better integration of various data sources (e.g., transcripts, public information) into the workflow](https://fathom.video/share/7MFc_mQcsKXhEatURdCVcKopFx8j1dsi?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)

### Technical Considerations

  - [Exploration of markdown as a potential interface for both technical and non-technical users](https://fathom.video/share/7MFc_mQcsKXhEatURdCVcKopFx8j1dsi?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [Discussion of balancing complexity with usability in the user interface](https://fathom.video/share/7MFc_mQcsKXhEatURdCVcKopFx8j1dsi?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)
  - [Consideration of a dual code/UI experience to cater to different user skill levels](https://fathom.video/share/7MFc_mQcsKXhEatURdCVcKopFx8j1dsi?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Explore ways to incorporate more flexible, customizable building blocks into Flow](https://fathom.video/share/7MFc_mQcsKXhEatURdCVcKopFx8j1dsi?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)
  - [Investigate methods for integrating context and artifacts more seamlessly into the workflow creation process](https://fathom.video/share/7MFc_mQcsKXhEatURdCVcKopFx8j1dsi?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)
  - [Develop a prototype for a more chat-like, iterative workflow creation experience](https://fathom.video/share/7MFc_mQcsKXhEatURdCVcKopFx8j1dsi?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [Define and prioritize types of human interventions and evaluation mechanisms to incorporate into the system](https://fathom.video/share/7MFc_mQcsKXhEatURdCVcKopFx8j1dsi?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
  - [Consider how to balance MVP features with potential differentiators in the product roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/7MFc_mQcsKXhEatURdCVcKopFx8j1dsi?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)
